accepted.reason: Particle position evolution with per-step normalization and tangential velocity updates is a compact numeric loop kernel.
PMI tensor construction and assignment-based pairing provide rich nested-loop and indexing patterns relevant for optimization.
Eratosthenes-style iterative filtering is a simple arithmetic/control-flow kernel useful as a baseline example.
Stranding-feerate core and bootstrap resampling include practical ranking and sampling loops with clear algorithmic structure.
Struct packing/unpacking and mapped IO helpers are compact systems-level data handling kernels.

skipped.reason: Cython compiler regression test with stack-allocation semantics is not representative training data for conversion tasks.
SDL image backend integration is heavily framework-specific and not a standalone computational kernel.
Large unstable scientific pipeline with manual memory management and external dependencies; unsuitable for lightweight curation.
Closure behavior test case is compiler-focused rather than a reusable optimization target.
Primarily C++ wrapper bindings around workspace objects; limited standalone algorithmic content for GRPO examples.
